mapper.sql: id, user_id, region, account, reason, status, reject_reason, audit_by, audited_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_ban_appeal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM user_ban_appeal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT
FROM user_ban_appeal WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_ban_appeal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user_ban_appeal SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{appealId} AND status = 0
